%action AddMail All dad1 Now%%
%action AddMail All HasTownKey Received%%
%AddBuff 22 -2%%

%action IncrementStat Book_Speed%%
%action IncrementStat Book_Speed2%%
%action AddBuff statue_of_blessings_0 -2%%
%action AddMoney 4500%%
%action MarkEventSeen All 65%%
